LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT HARRY LENCZNER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6 (B) AND THE COURT'S FEBRUARY 17 DIRECTIVE. (301/PJB) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 100007916): HENRIQUES, JANALIE ANN SUBSTITUTED FOR WALSH, MARK D AS ATTORNEY FOR CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

LAW AND MOTION, 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT HARRY LENCZNER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR. THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE AT THE HEARING THAT CONFORMS WITH THE NOTICE OF HEARING REQUIREMENTS OF C C P 1005 (B). JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: ANNE MENDOZA , CSR # 6812 301/PJB

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT HARRY LENCZNER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 25, 2011 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301 FOR MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH ENDORSED-FILED COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOVING PAPERS PER LOCAL RULE 2.6(B) NO LATER THAN 2/18/11.
